name: storyteller-toolbox
description: Storyteller Toolbox — generators and printable prep sheets for game masters, solo players, and writers

scripts.extract: node scripts/extract-pilot.mjs && node scripts/extract-phase3.mjs && node scripts/extract-phase3-npc.mjs && node scripts/extract-solo.mjs && node scripts/extract-unfinished.mjs && npm run registries
scripts.smoke: npm run registries && node scripts/smoke-engine.mjs && node scripts/smoke-names.mjs && node scripts/smoke-everdeep.mjs && node scripts/smoke-terrain.mjs && node scripts/smoke-hydro.mjs && node scripts/smoke-geo.mjs && node scripts/smoke-settle.mjs && node scripts/smoke-realms.mjs && node scripts/smoke-riverfield.mjs && node scripts/smoke-landroute.mjs && node scripts/smoke-roadfield.mjs && node scripts/smoke-windfield.mjs && node scripts/smoke-currentfield.mjs && node scripts/smoke-sailing.mjs && node scripts/smoke-reproducible.mjs
